tickets.title: Cannot login to mobile app on iOS
tickets.description: App throws 'Network error' on every login attempt. Reinstall did not help.

tickets.title: Subscription renewal failed for January
tickets.description: Card was charged but plan still shows expired. Have screenshot of charge.

tickets.title: Dashboard graph not loading on Safari
tickets.description: Works on Chrome and Firefox. Safari shows blank chart area, no console errors.

tickets.title: Request: dark mode for the admin panel
tickets.description: Whole team works late hours. White admin panel is rough on the eyes.

tickets.title: Wrong invoice amount for order #4521
tickets.description: Invoice shows ₹47,200 but actual order was ₹42,700. Missing discount?

tickets.title: Password reset email never arrived
tickets.description: Tried 4 times over 2 days. Checked spam folder. Email is correct.

tickets.title: App crashes when uploading files >10MB
tickets.description: Upload progress goes to 90% then app force-closes. Reproducible every time.

tickets.title: Need bulk export of customer list
tickets.description: Currently can only export 100 at a time. We have 12,000 customers.

tickets.title: Two-factor auth code not received
tickets.description: SMS for 2FA never arrives. Tried voice call option, also fails.

tickets.title: Page goes blank after clicking 'Save'
tickets.description: Edit form on /products/:id. Save button → white screen. URL changes but no content.

tickets.title: Annual subscription discount not applied
tickets.description: Promo code ANNUAL25 should give 25% off. Showed full price at checkout.

tickets.title: API rate limiting too aggressive
tickets.description: 60 requests/min is too low for our integration. Need at least 200/min.

tickets.title: Customer data showing for wrong account
tickets.description: Logged in as Account A but see Account B's customers. Logged out, back in, same issue.

tickets.title: Add CSV import for product catalog
tickets.description: We have ~5000 SKUs. Manual entry is impossible. Want CSV upload with column mapping.

tickets.title: GST not calculating correctly for Maharashtra
tickets.description: Orders shipped to Maharashtra showing IGST instead of CGST+SGST. Wrong tax type.

tickets.title: Logout redirects to 404 page
tickets.description: After clicking logout, get a 'Page not found'. Have to manually go to /login.

tickets.title: Session expires too quickly during work
tickets.description: Get logged out every 15 minutes even while actively typing. Very disruptive.

tickets.title: Email notifications stopped after upgrade
tickets.description: Was getting daily summary emails. Nothing since upgrading to v3.2 last week.

tickets.title: Need quarterly report PDF download
tickets.description: Currently shows on-screen only. Need PDF for our investor meetings.

tickets.title: Mobile app freezes on launch
tickets.description: Splash screen shows for 5 seconds, then app becomes unresponsive. Force-quit needed.

tickets.title: Cannot delete archived projects
tickets.description: Delete button disabled even with admin role. Tooltip says 'insufficient permissions'.

tickets.title: Refund not processed after 7 days
tickets.description: Refund initiated on May 1. Bank says nothing received. Order #8842.

tickets.title: OTP delivery delayed by 5+ minutes
tickets.description: OTPs arriving after timeout window. Have to request 3-4 times for one login.

tickets.title: Filter dropdown empty in reports
tickets.description: Status filter on reports page shows empty list. Was working last week.

tickets.title: Want webhook support for ticket updates
tickets.description: We sync tickets to our internal Slack. Currently polling every 5 min — would prefer webhooks.

tickets.title: Tax invoice missing GSTIN field
tickets.description: Generated invoice doesn't show our GSTIN. Required for B2B claims.

tickets.title: Search broken on customer page
tickets.description: Typing in search bar returns no results, even for customers I know exist by name.

tickets.title: Need single sign-on with Google Workspace
tickets.description: Want to remove separate password for our team. Already use GW for everything.

tickets.title: Login page loops back after submit
tickets.description: Enter creds, click login, page reloads to login. No error message anywhere.

tickets.title: Slow page load on tickets dashboard
tickets.description: Takes 8-10 seconds to render. Used to be 2-3 seconds. Started after last release.

comments.content: Hi Rohit, can you share your iOS version and app build number? Also try toggling airplane mode and retry.
Reproduced on Safari 17.4. Looks like a flexbox issue with our chart container. Investigating.
Found it — `display: contents` not respected in Safari for our wrapper div. Patch coming this week.
Confirmed the discount was missed. Refunding ₹4,500 to original payment method. ETA 5-7 business days.
Refund processed successfully. Reference: REF-2026-04521. Marking as resolved.
Hi Meera, our email logs show all 4 attempts were sent. Could you check spam more carefully or whitelist no-reply@deskhub.in?
Found in promotions tab. Closing this — let us know if it happens again.
Working on a bulk export endpoint. Will support CSV and Excel. Limit raising to 50,000 per export.
Backend ready. Frontend integration in progress. Beta testers wanted — interested?
Reproduced. Looks like a state corruption issue when product has > 50 variants. Working on fix.
Promo code was valid but didn't apply due to a regex bug for codes starting with letters. Patched and refunded difference.
URGENT: data isolation issue. Pulling logs.
Confirmed — auth token caching bug. Hotfix deployed. All affected accounts notified separately.
Post-mortem published internally. Closing this ticket. Thank you for the urgent report.
Verified — our tax engine is using shipping state instead of state-of-supply rules. Fix is non-trivial, ETA 1 week.
Email service config was overwritten in v3.2 release. Restoring queues now.
Refund was stuck in our payment gateway's review queue. Manually pushed through. Should reflect in 24-48 hours.
Filter was empty because no tickets matched the cached filter set. Cleared cache, working now.
SSO with Google Workspace is in our Q3 roadmap. Will keep this ticket open and update when it ships.
Profiled the page — N+1 query problem on the new comments-count column. Optimisation patch in QA.
